protocol_name: Trade IQ Frozen Untouched Cross-Market Validation

evaluation_period.reason: Matches the chronological development period while validating on entirely new markets.

primary_candidate.name: frozen_close_location_soft_risk
primary_candidate.description: Reduce risk only when directional close location is at or below the frozen development threshold.

secondary_candidate.name: frozen_conjunction_soft_risk
secondary_candidate.description: Reduce risk only when the frozen close-location condition and a frozen robust-negative regime group both trigger.

exploratory_comparator.name: frozen_selective_regime_soft_risk
exploratory_comparator.reason: The standalone nested regime policy failed development criteria.

decision_rules: The primary candidate is evaluated first against all preregistered primary criteria.
Failure of any required primary criterion means the primary candidate fails validation.
The secondary candidate is evaluated independently against all secondary criteria.
The exploratory regime comparator cannot generate a validation claim.
No threshold, regime group, multiplier, stop loss, take profit, spread or slippage assumption may be changed after results are viewed.
No market may be removed because of an unfavourable result.
No additional policy may be created from validation-market results.
The six validation markets must be reported individually and in aggregate.
The previously viewed post-2024 development-market holdout must not be reused.
A successful result permits prospective paper trading, not immediate live-money deployment.
